locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

relations.subject: Ashy thrush
relations.evidence: It is found in tropical moist primary and secondary forest with a large majority up to 1,100 meters above sea level with a few records up to 1,560 meters above sea level. The International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed this bird as vulnerable with the population estimated to be 6,000 to 15,000 mature individuals with the population declining

relations.subject: Ashy thrush
relations.evidence: It occurs in the protected areas Angat Watershed Forest Reserve, Quezon Protected Landscape, Mount Makiling National Park and Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park however, like most areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation and hunting persist even in these areas

relations.subject: Ashy thrush
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, and the illegal wildlife trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Ashy thrush
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion, road development and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Ashy thrush
relations.evidence: It may also suffer from hunting with snares in the Sierra Madre and illicit bird-trapping at Dalton Pass may exert a considerable pressure
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
